Speaker 1: Here you are.
Rach: Thank you Joey. You know what? I'm not even sure I can have caffeine.
Speaker 3: I went through this with Ben and Carol. One cup of coffee won't affect your milk.
Rach: Yeah. Just to be sure I'm gonna call Dr. Wiener.
Rach: Every time?
Speaker 1: Uhuh.
Speaker 3: Rach, you don't have to call whenever you have a little question, okay? Trust me, I know this.
Rach: All right, I trust you.
Speaker 3: Rachel, I can see you dialing! I don't understand why...
Rach: I'm on the phone! Dr. Wiener?
